session.assistant:
## Finalization Status: SUCCESS
All CI checks passed and the PR has been submitted.
**Changes made** (`packages/erk-dev/src/erk_dev/commands/reserve_pypi_name/command.py`):
- Removed `PLACEHOLDER_VERSION` constant - Added `version: str` parameter to `render_pyproject()` and `render_init_py()` - Added `version: str` parameter to `write_project_files()` - Added `--version` click option (default `"0.0.1"`) to `reserve_pypi_name_command` - Updated dry-run output to show the version being used
**Tests updated** (`packages/erk-dev/tests/test_reserve_pypi_name.py`):
- Updated existing calls to pass `version` argument - Added two new tests: `test_render_pyproject_uses_provided_version` and `test_write_project_files_uses_provided_version`
**CI results:**
- Lint (ruff): PASSED - Format (ruff format): PASSED - Prettier: PASSED (fixed 2 unrelated pre-existing files) - ty: PASSED - Unit tests: 6297 total passed - AGENTS.md standard: PASSED
**PR**: https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/9269
